response.justification: Wei Chen brings well over a decade of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes) and current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq, which directly matches the unusual AI agent development requirement. A demonstrated software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing workshops) fits the quality-focused responsibilities. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest experience, though adjacent skills suggest a fast ramp-up.
strengths: 19+ years of full-stack experience with core stack match: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, ran testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python absent from skills; Java experience appears dated and secondary
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly mentioned; testing tooling experience skews toward D-lang and Selenium
